title: Polar.DB USequence reverse load + build + random GetByKey, 1M persons
description: Creates a Polar.DB USequence person dataset, loads 1,000,000 records in reverse id order, builds the sequence/index state, reopens through Refresh, performs a direct point lookup, then performs a deterministic random point lookup batch. Compares only current Polar.DB source, Polar.DB 2.1.0, and Polar.DB 2.1.1.

dataset.notes: Reference scenario from uploaded Program.cs: npersons = 1_000_000, reverse id load, Build, GetByKey, then 10000 random GetByKey calls.

workload.notes: Load records, Build, close/reopen with Refresh, direct lookup, then random point lookup batch.

fairness.notes: All targets use the same Polar.DB adapter scenario and the same dataset/workload parameters. SQLite is intentionally excluded.
